summary: Full regression after dark/WebGL redesign. Backend unchanged — 9/9 pytest tests pass (projects=6, services=6, contact POST=201 + MongoDB persistence, 422 validations, status legacy). Frontend: all data-testids render, 0 console errors, 0 page errors. Hero WebGL renders, Lenis smooth-scroll works (nav-link-founder scrolled 0→4286), marquee, 6 project cards, 6 service cards, Founder section with Camillo portrait, 4 animated stats counters (120+, 35, 4.9/5, 99.99%), footer with logo + year 2026 + 3 social links, mobile menu toggles & anchor click closes menu and scrolls, contact form submits → 201 + success banner + toast + form resets, empty submit triggers validation toast. Custom cursor DOM elements present, scroll-progress bar present.
action_items: Minor testid naming: review_request expected contact-name/contact-email/contact-message but actual implementation uses contact-input-name/contact-input-email/contact-input-message (Contact.jsx:148-167). Functionality is correct — flag only so future agents use the right selectors.
critical_code_review_comments: Contact.jsx uses testid prefix `contact-input-*` for form fields while the review request / docs reference `contact-name` etc. Consider unifying naming for consistency.
GET /api/contact remains public and returns all submissions incl. emails (carried over from iteration 1). Restrict or remove for production to avoid PII exposure.
server.py: logger is declared after being referenced in create_contact's except block — works due to late binding but move logging setup above route definitions for clarity.

Stats cards prefix decorator digits (01, 02, 03, 04) appear concatenated in DOM text alongside actual counter values (e.g. '01120+Projetos entregues'). Not a bug — intentional design — but if used in automated assertions, parse with care.
seed_data_creation: Contact tests created a TEST_ prefixed document in MongoDB 'contacts' collection (both via pytest and Playwright UI flow). Not cleaned up — low volume, identifiable by TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression test file: /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (9 tests, all passing). Contact form testids use prefix contact-input-name|email|company|message (not contact-name). Mobile nav uses data-testid=mobile-nav + mobile-nav-link-{work|services|founder|contact} + mobile-nav-cta. Founder section id=founder replaced old 'about' section. No @react-three/fiber — vanilla three.js WebGLScene component. Lenis smooth-scroll works across anchor clicks.
